name: pinnedai-mcp
description: Stops your AI from re-introducing bugs, leaking provider keys, or weakening tests. Bug fixes become permanent regression guards; blocked mistakes become AI lessons the agent reads and learns from before its next edit.
long_description:
When your AI coder (Claude / Cursor / Cline / Copilot) fixes a bug in your repo, Pinned writes a permanent test that catches that bug if it ever comes back. When the agent tries to skip a failing test, leak an API key, or weaken an auth check, Pinned blocks the commit and saves a lesson the agent reads and learns from before its next edit.

This MCP server exposes Pinned's guard-checking and lesson-learning to MCP-aware agents (Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline / Continue) as 6 tools. Each response includes a human_summary and agent_instruction field so the agent reports guard status in its final answer rather than using Pinned silently.

Local-first, no telemetry. Pairs with the pinnedai CLI (npm install -g pinnedai).

tools.name: pinned_before_code_change
tools.description: Surfaces active guards + AI lessons before edits. Call before editing an AI-coded repo.

tools.name: pinned_before_done_check
tools.description: Runs the full guard check before reporting work complete. Returns PASS / REVIEW / BLOCK.

tools.name: pinned_scan_diff
tools.description: Finds unprotected risk surfaces in the current diff (new routes, webhooks, env edits, etc.).

tools.name: pinned_list_guards
tools.description: Lists active Pinned guards in the repository.

tools.name: pinned_check_pr_description
tools.description: Parses a PR description for behavioral claims (auth, rate-limits, webhook idempotency, etc.).

tools.name: pinned_suggest_init
tools.description: Checks whether a repository has Pinned installed. Recommends `npx pinnedai init` if missing.
